title: Shazu Sakura Pack
description: 🌸 Blossom & Sakura themed texture pack with soft pink visuals, smooth textures, and a calm aesthetic for survival, SMP, and builds.
body:
### 🌸🌸🌸 BLOSSOM & SAKURA TEXTURE PACK 🌸🌸🌸

✨ A soft, aesthetic Minecraft texture pack inspired by cherry blossoms and Sakura season, designed for smooth gameplay and beautiful visuals.

# 🌸 Features
🌸 Blossom & Sakura themed textures.
🎨 Soft pink and pastel color palette.

✨ Clean, smooth, and aesthetic visuals.

⚡ Optimized for good FPS and performance.

🧱 Enhanced blocks, items, and UI style.

🌸 Best For
🌿 Survival & SMP worlds

🏯 Japanese / Sakura-style builds

🎥 Content creators & screenshots

🧘 Calm and aesthetic gameplay lovers
